---
title: "The Queen-Woman.\' By C.M. Yonge"
---

## The Queen-Woman.\' By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1899
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 9.34 (April 1899) 65-71.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
